/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION FOR OUT-OF-STATE TRAVEL ALLOWANCE/MO GRTD/X:THE COURTWILL ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO TRAVEL OUT-OF-STATE BETWEEEN THE DATES OF 11-30-19 THRU 11-02-19/CTORD:THE GPS DEVICE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT TODAY//CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO RETURN TO 70 OAK GROVE ST, ON 11-04-19 TO HAVE THEGPS DEVICE REAFFIXED TO THE DEFENDANT/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/LD:12-17-19/X:JAMES BUSTAMANTE HAS BEEN RETAINED IN THIS MATTER; RICHARD HULLINGER SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR HIM TODAY/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER IS RELIEVED INTHIS MATTER/
